description: Promoted from experiment_2026-04-22_sl14_bblk3_cmf010 on 2026-04-24 — see docs/pdca/2026-04-24_promotion_v6.md. v6 combined candidate (v5 base + bb_squeeze_lookback=3 + CMF BUY gate 0.10).
